props.children: Turn traffic into pipeline — without another tab.
Full-screen marketing shell: hero, KPIs, charts, CRM-style table, drawer, and modal — all declarative JSON.

props.children: Blend acquisition and product analytics in one surface. Charts read from `state.charts`.
Use `TabPanel` to isolate dense copy from the default overview.

props.title: Connect warehouse
props.description: Wire `onMountAction` + API_CALL to hydrate funnel stages.

props.children: Use `CHAIN` for multi-step updates (e.g. close modal and reset fields).
Prefer `state.*` plus `API_CALL` on success to merge hydrated series.
Live API — load, filter, sort, create, update, delete

Document `onMountAction` runs GET todos. Table: global search (`filterBind`), per-column filters (`columnFiltersBind`), sortable headers (`onSortAction` + `CHAIN`). POST creates a todo, PATCH updates id 1, DELETE uses dynamic URL `…/todos/{{state.crm.deleteId}}`; each write chains a GET to refresh. Requires network (jsonplaceholder.typicode.com).

props.title: Filter is bound
props.children: `filterBind` syncs the table filter to `state` for client-side narrowing.
We’ll reach out at the email below. This modal uses `CHAIN` on close to reset the field.
